subcodes.first_line: O Husayn! He Who hath been made a target for the darts of the enemies in the path of God, the Lord of the Day of Judgment, maketh mention of thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حسین یذکرک من کان هدفا لسهام الاعدآء فی سبیل الله مالک یوم الدین قد رات
subcodes.subjects: @power of the Manifestation of God, @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment
